name: icebox
description: Icebox — an MCP server of interactive mini apps: color picker, dice, coin flip, card draw, spin wheel, decision die, Wordle, and Snake
author: Saurabh Yadav (https://saurabh-yadav.me)

scripts.build: npm run build:apps && npm run bundle:html && tsc --noEmit
scripts.build:apps: cross-env CLEAN=1 INPUT=color-picker.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=dice.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=coin.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=card.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=wheel.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=decision-dice.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=wordle.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=snake.html vite build
scripts.vercel-build: npm run build:apps && npm run bundle:html
scripts.start: cross-env NODE_ENV=development npm run build && npm run serve
